Título do vídeo: O HOMEM-ARANHA VAI MORRER EM BRAND NEW DAY?
Descrição do vídeo:
O trailer de Brand New Day quebrou recordes, mas, escondeu pistas sombrias que quase ninguém percebeu. Casulo de teia, olhos pretos e uma palavra que muda tudo: renascimento. Coincidência ou a Marvel está preparando a morte definitiva do Peter Parker?

Neste vídeo, você vai entender como Brand New Day pode adaptar uma das histórias mais brutais dos quadrinhos, a possível conexão com o simbionte do Venom, o papel do Justiceiro e até como isso pode impactar Guerras Secretas e o futuro do MCU. Será que estamos prestes a versão mais Dark do Homem Aranha? Assiste até o final porque as peças desse quebra-cabeça se encaixam perfeitamente.

Título do vídeo: Air Supply — Making Love Out of Nothing at All (Sub. Español)
Descrição do vídeo:
🎙️ Artista | Air Supply
💿 Canción | Making Love Out of Nothing at All
📅 Fecha de Lanzamiento | 01/07/1983
📻 Géneros Musicales | Pop

✨ Acerca de la Canción:
“Making Love Out of Nothing at All” de Air Supply es una de las baladas más poderosas del soft rock de los 80, escrita por Jim Steinman. La canción juega con un contraste brillante: el narrador afirma saber hacer casi todo en la vida… excepto una cosa imposible de dominar — dejar a la persona que ama. Es una declaración emocional intensa donde el amor no nace de condiciones, sino “de la nada”, desde la pura conexión y entrega.

Título do vídeo: Invincible - Season 4 | Final Trailer Episode 6 | invincible season 4 episode 6 trailer
Descrição do vídeo:
Invincible - Season 4 | Final Trailer Episode 6 | invincible season 4 episode 6 trailer

Take a Look 'EPISODE 6 PROMO TRAILER' concept for Prime Video,s Invincible Season 4 Episode 6 Trailer

Invincible is an American adult animated superhero television series created by Robert Kirkman for the streaming service Amazon Prime Video, based on the Image Comics comic book series of the same name he co-created with Cory Walker and Ryan Ottley. It is produced by Skybound Entertainment, Wind Sun Sky Entertainment, Point Grey Pictures, and Amazon MGM Studios. The series follows teenager Mark Grayson, a human-alien hybrid being, who becomes a crime-fighting superhero known as "Invincible" under the guidance of his father, Nolan Grayson / Omni-Man, the most powerful superhero on the planet. During his transformation, Mark finds himself struggling between his personal life and superhero duties and is forced to prove that he can be the hero that his father is, unaware of a conspiracy that threatens the world and leaves him questioning the true nature of his role. Steven Yeun stars in the series as Mark Grayson / Invincible alongside J. K. Simmons and Sandra Oh as Mark's father and mother, Nolan Grayson / Omni-Man and Debbie Grayson, respectively, while the remaining cast members have recurring roles.

Invincible premiered its eight-episode first season across March and April 2021, after which Amazon renewed the series for a second and third season. A prequel special, "Invincible: Atom Eve", was released in July 2023. The eight-episode second season was divided into two parts, first released in November 2023, then across March and April 2024. The eight-episode third season was released between February and March 2025. The fourth season premiered on March 18, 2026. A fifth season has also been announced ahead of its release.

The series has received widespread critical acclaim, with praise for its animation, action sequences, story, voice performances (particularly Yeun, Oh, and Simmons), faithfulness to the comics, and emotional weight. It has been nominated for two Primetime Emmy Awards, two Annie Awards and the Critics' Choice Television Award for Best Animated Series.
